About Mrs. Ferdina Melven

Dedicated Educator & Founder of Adonai Tuition Center

Mrs. Ferdina Melven is a passionate educator with over 25 years of teaching experience. She has successfully guided hundreds of students toward academic excellence through personalized teaching methods, regular assessments, and individual attention.

Her commitment to student success and innovative teaching approaches have made Adonai Tuition Center a trusted choice for parents and students across the city.

  • Personalized Learning Approach
  • Individual Attention & Support
  • Concept-Based Teaching Method
  • Friendly Learning Environment

Our Programs

Comprehensive learning programs designed to support students at every stage of their academic journey. From building strong foundations to achieving exam success, we help students learn with confidence.

📘 Regular Academic Program

Year-round classes for academic success.

Classes 1-5

Foundation Building Years

  • All Core Subjects
  • Foundation Building
  • Homework Support
  • Basic Concepts

🌞 Summer Enrichment Program

Special summer batches to help students get ahead.

Class 10

10th Maths & Science

Intensive summer coaching in Class 10 Mathematics and Science — giving students a strong head start before the new academic year.

Skill Building

Math, English & Reading

Focused classes to improve Mathematics, English grammar and reading skills — building confident, all-round learners.

Why Choose Adonai?

Excellence in Every Aspect of Education

25+ Years Experience

Proven track record of academic excellence and student success

Individual Attention

Personalized focus on each student's learning needs

Small Batch Size

Limited seats per batch to ensure quality teaching

Regular Tests

Frequent assessments to track progress and improvement

Homework Assistance

Complete support with school assignments and projects

Friendly Environment

Comfortable and supportive learning atmosphere

Performance Tracking

Regular feedback and progress reports for parents

Affordable Fees

Competitive pricing with excellent quality education

Student & Parent Reviews

Success Stories from Our Community

★★★★★

"Both my daughter's attended classes here. Exceptional teacher, firm tutor who gave personal attention to all her pupils. Engaged my children with various art activities during summer vacation. Highly recommended."

Devina Anto4 reviews · 4 years ago
★★★★★

"The right place for CBSE and international syllabus. Dedicated teacher who handles classes even during summer holidays. Seems to be experienced. I wish Mrs. Ferdina is in good health and assists the students to achieve their dreams."

Shalom Tuition CentreLocal Guide · 34 reviews · 2 photos · 1 year ago
★★★★★

"My son got Individual attention. Ma'am was firm yet gentle in dealing with the students. Tuition centre was very professionally managed. We were able to see a significant improvement in the overall grades of my son. Highly recommended."

Beatrice Asha4 reviews · 1 photo · 3 years ago

Admissions Open

Join Adonai Tuition Center Today

Admissions are now open for Classes 1st to 10th Standard. We have limited seats available for each batch to ensure personal attention and effective learning for every student.

  • Small batch sizes with personalized attention
  • Experienced educator with 25+ years background
  • Regular tests and performance tracking
  • Flexible timings and homework support
